name: implementing-ransomware-backup-strategy
description: Designs and implements a ransomware-resilient backup strategy following the 3-2-1-1-0 methodology (3 copies, 2 media types, 1 offsite, 1 immutable/air-gapped, 0 errors on restore verification). Configures backup schedules aligned to RPO/RTO requirements, implements backup credential isolation to prevent ransomware from compromising backup infrastructure, and establishes automated restore testing. Activates for requests involving ransomware backup planning, backup resilience, air-gapped backup design, or backup recovery point objective configuration.
author: mahipal

reasons: Contains authorized security testing or incident response procedures that may require explicit scope and approval.

sourceNotice: Source: This skill is adapted from the open-source project https://github.com/mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills.
